title: [HW][LegalizeNames] verilogName attribute on ports ignored
body:
`LegalizeNames` ignores the `verilogName` when legalizing the port names.
This `mlir` produces the incorrect verilog.
```mlir
hw.module @rename_port(%r: i1 {hw.verilogName = "w"}) {
    %w = sv.wire : !hw.inout<i4>
    hw.output
}
```
```verilog
module rename_port(     // 1.mlir:1:1
  input w       // 1.mlir:1:24
);

  wire [3:0] w; // 1.mlir:2:10
endmodule
```
